creator: w.schwarzenfeld@utanet.at
text:
No conflict statement in mail/courier
CONFLICTS=      courier-imap-2.* couriermlm-0.* \
                exim-4.* maildrop-1.* \
                postfix-1.* postfix-2.* \
                qmail-*-1.* qmail-1.* \
                sendmail-*-8.* sendmail-8.* \
                smail-3.* sqwebmail-3.* \
                zmailer-2.*
It conflicts with a lot of ports - should not it reworked?
